3_gate_path_verification.where_check_entry_gates_is_called: NOWHERE in bot_core.py — the function is imported (line 92) but never called. The local signal generation path that previously called it was removed by AUTHORITY_SEPARATION_CLEANUP_001. The bridge path was never wired to call it.
3_gate_path_verification.bridge_gate_pass_clarification: The 'BRIDGE GATE PASS' log lines (core.model_bridge) are internal model_bridge gates checking rec_age and slug dedup only — they are NOT check_entry_gates() calls and do NOT check MIN_ENTRY_CONFIDENCE.
3_gate_path_verification.notes: check_entry_gates is imported at line 92 but has zero call sites in bot_core.py. NEAR_RESOLUTION_PRICE is also imported (line 92) but that is used directly in exit checks. The gate code in risk.py is correct and complete — the wiring is missing.

6_root_cause.hypothesis_a_bypass: CONFIRMED — bot_core.py bridge section (lines 454-519) never calls check_entry_gates(). The gate was added to risk.py but the bridge entry path was never wired to call it. This is the root cause.
6_root_cause.hypothesis_b_value_mismatch: NOT APPLICABLE — gate is never reached, so value comparison never happens
6_root_cause.hypothesis_c_stale_process: RULED OUT — PROCESS_CLEANUP_VERIFY_001 confirmed exactly one bot_core.py process at restart. Multiple restarts occurred post-14:40, all consistent with normal launcher behavior.
6_root_cause.hypothesis_d_restart_mismatch: RULED OUT — log line 16321 confirms startup at exactly 14:40:43 CDT, matching PID artifact. .env and risk.py both contain correct MIN_ENTRY_CONFIDENCE=0.60. Code change was live.
6_root_cause.hypothesis_e_gate_disabled: RULED OUT — MIN_ENTRY_CONFIDENCE=0.60 is in .env and read correctly in risk.py. Default is 0.60, not 0.0.
6_root_cause.most_likely_cause: (a) Bridge bypass path — check_entry_gates() is imported but never called in bot_core.py. The MIN_ENTRY_CONFIDENCE_001 task added the gate to risk.py but did not add a call to check_entry_gates() in the bridge section of bot_core.py. The authority separation cleanup (AUTHORITY_SEPARATION_CLEANUP_001) removed the local signal path that previously called check_entry_gates(), leaving the bridge path as the only entry path — with no gate call.
6_root_cause.confidence_in_finding: HIGH — confirmed by direct code inspection and log evidence

next_action.fix_description: Add check_entry_gates() call in bot_core.py bridge section, between Signal construction (line 503) and open_position() call (line 504). On gate rejection, log BRIDGE GATE REJECT [confidence_floor] and continue to next intent. This is the same pattern already used for other pre-entry checks in the bridge section.
next_action.fix_scope: bot_core.py only — risk.py is correct as-is
next_action.fix_urgency: HIGH — all bridge entries are currently bypassing the confidence floor. Per the confidence audit data, multiple live trades have confidence < 0.40 which is well below the intended 0.60 floor.
next_action.rationale: Real bug confirmed: check_entry_gates() exists and is correct but is never called in the only active entry path. Every bridge trade bypasses the confidence floor entirely.

model_bridge_py_read_justification: Not needed — bot_core.py code inspection was sufficient to confirm the bypass path. model_bridge.py's BRIDGE GATE PASS/REJECT behavior was confirmed from log evidence alone.
